introSection: Great Chase is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Six Flags New England in Agawam, Massachusetts, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The coaster originally opened as Rolling Thunder in 1996 and was located in front of the Black Widow. Its name and location changed after the 1999 season, when Six Flags rebranded the park. The coaster moved to the location of the former Little Rickie's Little Twister, which was removed at the end of the year. Great Chase would be the new name of the ride, along with a Looney Tunes theme.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * Great Chase on the parks website

fullText:
Great Chase is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Six Flags New England in Agawam, Massachusetts, USA.

The coaster originally opened as Rolling Thunder in 1996 and was located in front of the Black Widow. Its name and location changed after the 1999 season, when Six Flags rebranded the park. The coaster moved to the location of the former Little Rickie's Little Twister, which was removed at the end of the year. Great Chase would be the new name of the ride, along with a Looney Tunes theme.



Red track and supports.




 * Great Chase on the parks website
